components.description: Shared Inlay namespace + a designer-friendly spring token and a one-line UIViewPropertyAnimator wrapper. Installed once; many components depend on it.
components.name: spring-animator
components.title: Spring Animator

components.description: A floating, pill-shaped toolbar with a glass or solid background, spring entrance animation, tactile press feedback, and an optional selection highlight.
components.name: floating-toolbar
components.title: Floating Toolbar
components.usage:
let toolbar = FloatingToolbar(items: [
    .init(icon: UIImage(systemName: "house.fill"))      { print("home") },
    .init(icon: UIImage(systemName: "magnifyingglass")) { print("search") },
])
view.addSubview(toolbar)
NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
    toolbar.centerXAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerXAnchor),
    toolbar.bottomAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.safeAreaLayoutGuide.bottomAnchor, constant: -16),
])

variants.description: Opaque background that adapts to light/dark mode.
variants.title: Solid

components.description: A looping loading indicator with three styles — rotating arc, pulsing dots, and equalizer bars. Auto-starts on screen, zero dependencies.
components.name: loading-indicator
components.title: Loading Indicator
components.usage:
let loader = LoadingIndicator()
view.addSubview(loader)
loader.translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
    loader.centerXAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerXAnchor),
    loader.centerYAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerYAnchor),
])

variants.description: A single rotating stroked arc. The default.
variants.title: Arc

components.description: A polished settings list row — SF Symbol in a rounded color tile, title with optional subtitle, and a trailing chevron, value, or switch. Springy press feedback and haptics.
components.name: settings-row
components.title: Settings Row

variants.description: Drill-in row with a trailing chevron. The default.
variants.title: Chevron

variants.description: Row with a trailing switch; use onToggle.
variants.title: Toggle

variants.description: Row showing a current value plus chevron.
variants.title: Value

components.description: An animated success/error badge — a ring strokes on, the checkmark or cross draws after it, and the badge springs in with a matching haptic. Perfect for confirmation overlays.
components.name: status-feedback
components.title: Status Feedback
components.usage:
let done = StatusFeedbackView()
view.addSubview(done)
done.translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
    done.centerXAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerXAnchor),
    done.centerYAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerYAnchor),
])

variants.description: Green ring + checkmark, success haptic. The default.
variants.title: Success
